selfcheck.chosen_text: Para reutilizar presentación y auditar métricas en Python
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «Jinja y separación datos/presentación» — data prepared in Python; template only presents; never heavy business logic in template so metrics stay auditable and reusable.
[A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «PDF digital vs imagen/OCR» — scanned PDF is image and needs OCR; low char density → needs_ocr. Not openpyxl.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Mismas métricas clave en dashboard, Excel y documento
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «gráficos, tablas…» + T4 demos — paridad means same key metrics across dashboard, Excel, and document (dash == xlsx == doc).

selfcheck.chosen_text: Provenance, checklist visual y hallazgos trazables
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: cierre CP-N2-B — provenance completo + checklist visual (dashboard, xlsx, doc) + hallazgos with evidence ids. Not secrets or section_passed from this lane.

retrospection.note: Knowledge limited to sequential packets through active section.
